esp32.description: ESP32 family optimized by tsuki-ex: 80 MHz default, power management enabled, -Os binary, 2 Mbaud upload. Includes ESP32, S2, and C3 variants.

esp8266.description: ESP8266 family optimized by tsuki-ex: modem sleep between transmissions, reduced lwIP stack, -Os binary, 2 Mbaud upload. Includes generic ESP8266 and Wemos D1 Mini.

esp32.description: ESP32 Dev Module — 80 MHz default, WiFi on-demand, no BT, -Os, 2 Mbaud upload
esp32.author: tsuki-ex

esp8266.description: ESP8266 Generic — modem sleep, -Os, 2 Mbaud upload
esp8266.author: tsuki-ex

esp32s2.description: ESP32-S2 Dev Module — LP core enabled, 80 MHz default, -Os
esp32s2.author: tsuki-ex

esp32c3.description: ESP32-C3 Dev Module — BLE-only by default, 80 MHz, -Os, RISC-V
esp32c3.author: tsuki-ex

d1_mini.description: Wemos D1 Mini — ESP8266 modem sleep, -Os, 2 Mbaud upload
d1_mini.author: tsuki-ex
